productName: Green Reaper Live Resin Badder - Cherry Pie - 1g
description: Creamy blond hybrid badder made from Cherry Pie — the whipping process draws the terpenes forward, giving this batter-textured dab a loud, fragrant nose. Creamy, terpy, and easy to handle — with notes of tree fruit, berry, and sweet, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
